sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost je velika vrlina u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: Truthfulness is a great character trait in Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّ الصِّدْقَ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْبِرِّ، وَإِنَّ الْبِرَّ يَهْدِي إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَدَبِ، حَدِيثُ ٦٠٩٤].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Zaista istina vodi ka dobročinstvu, a dobročinstvo vodi u Džennet' [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Indeed, truthfulness leads to righteousness, and righteousness leads to Paradise' [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ يَجِبُ أَنْ يَقُولَ الْحَقَّ دَائِمًا فِي كَلَامِهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora uvijek govoriti istinu u svom govoru.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must always speak the truth in his speech.

sentences.arabic: الصِّدْقُ يَجْعَلُ النَّاسَ يَثِقُونَ بِكَ وَيُحِبُّونَكَ.
sentences.translation: Istinoljubivost čini da ti ljudi vjeruju i da te vole.
sentences.translationEn: Honesty makes people trust and love you.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْخُلُقُ يَرْفَعُ دَرَجَةَ الْمُؤْمِنِ عِنْدَ اللهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Ovaj ahlak podiže stepen vjernika kod Uzvišenog Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: This character trait raises the believer's status with Allah the Almighty.
